title: cyperus laevigatus subsp. distachyos
intro: Cyperus laevigatus subsp. distachyos is a plant species commonly known as the smooth flatsedge, which belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is a perennial herb native to tropical and subtropical regions, known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can provide various health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory issues. Cyperus laevigatus subsp. distachyos can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
intro_study: According to "Molecules (Basel, Switzerland)", cyperus laevigatus subsp. distachyos has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce thioacetamide-induced hepatorenal toxicity.
